A fix for off-site repositories on backends that need a modern rclone.

## Fixed

- **Off-site repositories on backends like Jottacloud now initialize.** BombVault bundled rclone from Debian's package (v1.60.1), which is too old for some backends — Jottacloud in particular returned an HTTP 500 `AllocationException` when restic tried to create the repo's key, so it never wrote `config` and the repository looked non-existent. BombVault now bundles the current official rclone binary (v1.74.x), the same way it already pulls the current restic instead of Debian's stale one. If you hit this on Jottacloud (or any other backend that needs a newer rclone), pull the new image and retry. (#32, thanks @strese)

---
